name: claude-skills
description: 19-category solo-SaaS-founder platform. Autonomous engineering OS with 18 agents, 117 doctrine rules, 20+ slash commands, production forge script, LLM eval harness, MCP server registry, DO agent scaffolding, RAG pipeline, multi-tenant subdomain provisioning, document processing (DOCX/XLSX/PDF/PPTX), non-engineering verticals (finance, compliance, PM, C-suite), and 32 AI-tool platform variants. One-line prompts to deployed Cloudflare Workers products.
author: Brian Zalewski
